S.FORM: Patrick Beverley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 7, Patrick Beverley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
